title: Newborn feeding review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Specifies vital signs, uterine involution, lochia, wound healing, bladder and bowel function, feeding, mood, support, family planning, pelvic floor, indicated tests, and documented follow-up.

source.title: Postnatal Care Program Standards
source.population: Postpartum women and newborns during the first six weeks following childbirth.
source.setting: DoH-licensed facility, outpatient, home-visit, and teleconsultation postnatal services in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for Abu Dhabi postnatal follow-up during the first six weeks; partial for later postpartum care and settings outside Abu Dhabi.

exact_location.heading: 1. Standard Scope and postnatal check schedule

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines Abu Dhabi postnatal services and four checks through six weeks, with timing and mode adjusted for risk.

assessment.text: Requires maternal physical and emotional assessment, postpartum haemorrhage and hypertensive-risk screening, feeding support, family planning discussion, continuity, and EMR documentation.
